name: browser-automation
tagline: ClawHub (64★): Automate web browser interactions using natural language via CLI commands. Use when the user asks to browse websites, naviga
verdict: Functionally strong, security and quality both clean, but hygiene drags it down: the frontmatter name is just 'browser' while the directory is 'browser-automation', a mismatch that can confuse skill lookup. It also states no scope boundary against overlapping browser tools.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope / pointer-to-other-skill text appears anywhere in description or body, despite the skill's broad scope overlapping adjacent browser/testing automation s
Skill directory is browser-automation but frontmatter name is 'browser' — directory/name mismatch.
No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, no dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
